fields.question: How soon are you available to start a new role?
What is your current work authorization status for the country where you plan to be primarily based? Please specify the type of document/visa and its validity
Please select the level that most accurately describes your professional English communication skills (written and verbal)
options: C2 / Native or Bilingual (Total fluency, can lead complex strategic discussions with ease)
C1 / Advanced (Professional fluency, can handle ambiguity and technical jargon)
B2 / Upper Intermediate (Effective operational proficiency, can lead squad-level tasks)
A1 - A2 / Beginner or Elementary (Basic greetings/short phrases)
